title: selaginella lindhardtii
intro: Selaginella lindhardtii, also known as the "spikemoss," is a type of small, non-vascular plant that belongs to the Selaginellaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Selaginella lindhardtii include its potential to reduce oxidative stress, improve cardiovascular health, and boost the immune system. Selaginella lindhardtii can be prepared into various herbal forms, including teas, capsules, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
